name: stackra/database
purpose: Data-layer building blocks: base model concerns, Blueprint macros, and data-shaping attributes like Searchable, Translatable, Sluggable, and Taggable.
capabilities: Model concerns (HasSlug, HasUuid, HasTags, HasSortOrder, HasStatus)
when_to_use: Defining a model, adding a Blueprint macro, or opting a model into slug / UUID / translation / sortable behaviour.
when_not_to_use: For repositories, request-driven filter/sort allow-lists, or CRUD endpoints, reach for stackra/crud instead.
